--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local end end return(function(V,I,y,P,c,q,a,z,d,X,m,w,s,l,L,Z,k,E,e,D,v,b,G)d,Z,v,s,k,b,X,L,e,l,z,E,G,w,D,m=function(V,U)local I=L(U)local y=function(y,P,c,q)return Z(V,{y;P;c,q},U,I)end return y
